3058770.name: Dragrave Marauders
3058770.description:
[Dungeon Marauders]
Choose your starting class and start as a raider looting an abandoned castle. As you venture deeper into the castle, you realize that there is a bigger story at play here. Adventure with the deuteragonist, "Lone Warrior", explore many new lands, to collect all the Elemental World Crystals and save the world!

[IMPORTANT]

If your screen starts freezing, but you are still able to move and hear sounds, and it happens often, please restart your PC and the problem should be resolved. Add charms to the game which modified the terms, so in order to use them, you must start a new game.                [Press f4 for Fullscreen!]
3058770.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
